patch_policies.name: tier0_human_gate
patch_policies.rule: Never auto-deploy tier0 services. Open MR and require human approval.

patch_policies.name: internet_facing_review
patch_policies.rule: Internet-facing services above risk score 74 require security review before deploy.

patch_policies.name: safe_auto_patch
patch_policies.rule: Internal tier2 services may auto-deploy when pipeline passes and risk score <= 74.
